headline: 暑期档新片扎堆，国产剧《痴迷》领跑
headlineEn: Summer Blockbusters Flood In, Chinese Drama 'Obsession' Leads
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：国产剧《痴迷》热度登顶，《末日地堡》等新片受关注。本周《福尔摩斯小姐3》等续集强势，未来《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》备受期待。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment news: Chinese drama 'Obsession' tops trending, 'Silo' and others gain attention. Sequels like 'Enola Holmes 3' dominate this week, with 'Spider-Man: Freshman Year' highly anticipated.

industryHighlights.text: 今日无新片上映，但本周《气体人第一号》等新片将陆续登场。
industryHighlights.en: No new releases today, but films like 'The First Gas Man' debut this week.

industryHighlights.text: 《玩具总动员5》进入本周热搜，经典IP持续吸粉。
industryHighlights.en: Toy Story 5 trends this week, classic IP continues to attract fans.

industryHighlights.text: 未来大片《奥德赛》与《鬼玩人6》定档，影迷期待值拉满。
industryHighlights.en: Upcoming 'Odyssey' and 'Evil Dead 6' set dates, fans highly anticipate.
